title: acanthocalyx nepalensis subsp. delavayi
intro: Acanthocalyx nepalensis subsp. delavayi, also known as the Delavay's flower, is a plant species that belongs to the bittersweet nightshade family and is native to China. The plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiviral properties, and is believed to have health benefits such as reducing fever and alleviating pain. Herbal preparations of Acanthocalyx nepalensis subsp. delavayi include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions. Additionally, the plant is also used to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant properties.
